title: Filicula bulbifera
intro: Filicula bulbifera, also known as the lesser club moss or Lycopodiella crenulata, is a type of vascular plant belonging to the group Lycopodiophyta. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to help lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Bioactive constituents of Filicula bulbifera include lycopene, alkaloids, and lignans, which are responsible for its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial activities. The plant is commonly prepared as a decoction or tea, as well as being used in capsule or tablet form, to harness its therapeutic benefits and support overall well-being.
